mapper.select:
select * from `admin`
username like concat('%', #{username}, '%') and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and id in
#{id}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into `admin` (username, password, name, phone, email, gender, role, avatar) values(#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{role}, #{avatar})
